query_name: 検証_営業割合 x 稼働率_APP CVR
query_string:
with app_log as (
  select
    time
    , 'event_date' as time_means
    , event_date as access_date
    , event_unixtime
    , event_timestamp_micros as event_timestamp
    , user_pseudo_id
    , try_cast(regexp_extract(event_params, '{"key":"customer_id","value":{"string_value":"(\d+)"', 1) as bigint) as customer_id
    , try_cast(regexp_extract(event_params, '{"key":"shop_no","value":{"string_value":"(\d+)"', 1) as bigint) as shop_no
    , try_cast(regexp_extract(event_params, '{"key":"reservation_id","value":{"string_value":"(\d+)"', 1) as bigint) as reservation_id
    , regexp_extract(event_params, '{"key":"ga_session_id","value":{"string_value":null,"int_value":(\d+)', 1) as ga_session_id
    , regexp_extract(traffic_source, '"name":"([^"]+)"', 1) as traffic_source_name
    , regexp_extract(traffic_source, '"medium":"([^"]+)"', 1) as traffic_source_medium
    , regexp_extract(traffic_source, '"source":"([^"]+)"', 1) as traffic_source_source
    , event_name
    , case event_name
        when 'onfocus_completed_booking_screen' then 5
        when 'g1_click_reserve_s3' then 4
        when 'menu_next' then 3
        when 'calendar_history' then 2
        when 'calendar_nearest' then 2
        when 'top_nomination_calendar' then 2
        when 'top_time_shop_book_again' then 2
        when 'top_time_shop_book_again_cart' then 2
        when 'top_time_shop_near' then 2
        when 'top_time_shop_near_cart' then 2
        when 'top_nomination_time_cart' then 2
        when 'top_nomination_time' then 2
        when 'top_option' then 2
        when 'top_location' then 2
        when 'onfocus_shop_detail_screen' then 2
        when 'g1_click_reserve_s2' then 2
        when 'suggest_reserve1' then 2
        when 'suggest_reserve2' then 2
        when 'suggest_reserve3' then 2
        when 'HistoryBookingScreen' then 2
        when 'SearchScreen' then 2
        when 'onfocus_scan_qr_code_screen' then 2
        when 'tpranking_banner' then 2
        when 'All_Therapist_favorite' then 2
        when 'all_nearest_shops' then 2
        when 'all_history_shops' then 2
        when 'first_open' then null
        when 'app_remove' then null
        when 'app_update' then null
        when 'notification_dismiss' then  null
        when 'notification_receive' then  null
        when 'screen_view' then  null
        when 'user_engagement' then  null
        when 'tracking_token' then  null
        when 'firebase_campaign' then  null
        when 'notification_foreground' then  null
        when 'notification_open' then  null
        when 'os_update' then  null
        else 1
      end as event_status
  from
    _l0_bigquery.firebase_event_log
  where
    time >= td_time_parse('2026-01-01', 'jst')
    and time <= td_time_parse('2026-04-30', 'jst')
)

, web_log_base as (
  select
    td_uid
    , ga_session_id
    , event_unixtime
    , access_date
    , shop_no
    , event_status
  from
    _integration_datamart.z_tmp_cls_web_log_104w
  where
    time >= td_time_parse('2026-01-01', 'jst')
    and time <= td_time_parse('2026-04-30', 'jst')
)

, web_log as (
  select
    td_uid
    , ga_session_id
    , event_unixtime
    , access_date

    , case
        when event_status = 4 and shop_no is null then
          max_by(
            if(event_status = 2, shop_no, null),
            if(event_status = 2, event_unixtime, null)
          ) over (
            partition by td_uid
            order by event_unixtime
            rows between unbounded preceding and current row
          )

        else shop_no
      end as shop_no

    , event_status
  from
    web_log_base
)

, ym_list as (
  select
    format_datetime(month_dt, 'yyyy-MM') as ym
  from
    unnest(
      sequence(
        date('2026-01-01'),
        date('2026-04-30'),
        interval '1' month
      )
    ) as t(month_dt)
)

, mst_shop as (
  select
    cast(shop_no as bigint) as shop_no
    , ym
    , property_id
    , shop_name
  from
    _integration_datamart.mst_shop
  cross join
    ym_list
  where
    status = '02'
)

, agg_session__app as (
  select
    shop_no
    , substr(access_date, 1, 7) as ym
    , count(distinct if(event_status in (1,2,3,4), user_pseudo_id||ga_session_id)) as session_count
    , count(distinct if(event_status in (1,2,3,4), user_pseudo_id)) as session_uu
    , count(distinct if(event_status in (4), user_pseudo_id)) as app_reserve_uu
  from
    app_log
  inner join
    mst_shop using (shop_no)
  group by
    1,2
)

, agg_session__web as (
  select
    shop_no
    , substr(access_date, 1, 7) as ym
    , count(distinct if(event_status in (1,2,3), ga_session_id)) as session_count
    , count(distinct if(event_status in (1,2,3), td_uid)) as session_uu
    , count(distinct if(event_status in (4), td_uid)) as web_reserve_uu
  from
    web_log
  inner join
    mst_shop using (shop_no)
  group by
    1,2
)

, agg_session as (
  select
    t0.shop_no
    , t0.ym
    , t0.session_count as session_count__app
    , t1.session_count as session_count__web
    , t0.session_uu as session_uu__app
    , t1.session_uu as session_uu__web
    , t0.app_reserve_uu
    , t1.web_reserve_uu
  from
    agg_session__app as t0
  left join
    agg_session__web as t1
    on t0.shop_no = t1.shop_no
       and t0.ym = t1.ym
)

, agg_order as (
  select
    substr(business_date, 1, 7) as ym
    , shop_no
    , count(distinct order_id) as order_count
    , count(distinct coalesce(cast(customer_id as varchar), phone_no, email)) as order_uu
  from
    _integration_datamart.cls_order_detail
  inner join
    mst_shop using (property_id)
  where
    td_time_parse(business_date, 'jst') >= td_time_parse('2026-01-01', 'jst')
    and td_time_parse(business_date, 'jst') <= td_time_parse('2026-04-30', 'jst')
  group by
    1,2
)

, order_log as (
  select
    distinct
    reservation_id
    , shop_no
  from
    cls_order_detail
  inner join
    mst_shop using (property_id)
)

, agg_reservation as (
  select
    coalesce(cast(t0.shop_no as bigint), cast(t1.shop_no as bigint)) as shop_no
    , substr(td_time_string(created_unixtime, 'd!', 'jst'), 1, 7) as ym
    , count(distinct coalesce(t0.reservation_id, t1.reservation_id)) as total_reservation_count
    , count(distinct coalesce(cast(t0.customer_id as varchar), t0.phone_no, t0.email)) as total_reservation_uu
    , count(distinct if(reserved_from = 'APP', coalesce(t0.reservation_id, t1.reservation_id))) as app_reservation_count
    , count(distinct if(reserved_from = 'WEB', coalesce(t0.reservation_id, t1.reservation_id))) as web_reservation_count
  from
    z_tmp_cls_reservation as t0
  left join
    order_log as t1
    on t0.reservation_id = t1.reservation_id
  where
    created_unixtime >= td_time_parse('2026-01-01', 'jst')
    and created_unixtime <= td_time_parse('2026-04-30', 'jst')
    and coalesce(cast(t0.shop_no as bigint), cast(t1.shop_no as bigint)) is not null
    and status in (1,2,3)
    and parent_reservation_id is null
  group by
    1,2
)

select
  ym as "年月"
  , shop_no as "店舗No"
  , shop_name as "店舗名"
  , session_count__app + session_count__web as "APP + WEB セッション数（予約確認、予約完了を除く店舗詳細ページ）"
  , session_count__app as "APP セッション数（予約確認、予約完了を除く店舗詳細ページ）"
  , session_count__web as "WEB セッション数（予約確認、予約完了を除く店舗詳細ページ）"
  , session_uu__app + session_uu__web as "APP + WEB セッションUU（予約確認、予約完了を除く店舗詳細ページ）"
  , session_uu__app as "APP セッションUU（予約確認、予約完了を除く店舗詳細ページ）"
  , session_uu__web as "WEB セッションUU（予約確認、予約完了を除く店舗詳細ページ）"
  , app_reservation_count + web_reservation_count as "APP + WEB 予約数"
  , app_reservation_count as "APP 予約数"
  , web_reservation_count as "WEB 予約数"
  , app_reserve_uu + web_reserve_uu as "APP + WEB 予約UU"
  , app_reserve_uu as "APP 予約UU"
  , web_reserve_uu as "WEB 予約UU"
  --, app_reservation_count as "APP 予約数"
  --, app_reserve_uu as "APP 予約UU"
  --, web_reservation_count as "WEB 予約数"
  --, web_reserve_uu as "WEB 予約UU"
  , total_reservation_count as "すべての経路 予約数"
  , total_reservation_uu as "すべての経路 予約者数"
  , order_count as "施術数"
  , order_uu as "施術者数"
from
  mst_shop
left join agg_session using (shop_no, ym)
left join agg_reservation using (shop_no, ym)
left join agg_order using (shop_no, ym)
order by
  1,2
